label: The Ironwrit Lodgings
description: The Ironwrit Lodgings occupies a narrow brick tenement stitched into a section of salvaged ashlar near Varric Holdfast’s courts, its façade scored with old toolmarks and later repair seams. Inside, steep stairs rise past a communal landing where posted notices, copied ordinances, and licensing seals are fixed beneath glass to deter tampering. The rooms are compact and deliberately spare, furnished with built-in bedsteads and iron-hasped cupboards suited to a city where records and goods remain subject to inspection. Sound carries through the mortar-thin walls, and every threshold bears the disciplined wear of tenants accustomed to curfews, audits, and hazard proclamations from the interdiction posts beyond the gates.
